LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER OAKLAND-ALAMEDA COUNTY COLISEUM AUTHORITY'S PETITION TO CONFIRM FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING PURSUANT TO A STIPULATION SUBMITTED BY THE PARTIES WHICH DISMISSES THE MATTER WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO LATER RE-FILING. ORDER ON STIPULATION SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER OAKLAND-ALAMEDA COUNTY COLISEUM AUTHORITY'S PETITION TO CONFIRM FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. No appearances. The court vacated its tentative ruling pursuant to a stipulation submitted by the parties which dismisses the matter without prejudice to later re-filing. Order on stipulation signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
